videos.script: Here's a secret most marketers won't tell you. Your hook matters more than your offer. Spend 80% of your time crafting the perfect opening line. The rest will follow.
Stop guessing. Start testing. The best campaigns come from systematic experimentation. Test one variable at a time. Document everything. Double down on what works. Rinse and repeat.
Your audience is not everyone. The more specific you get, the better your results. Speak to one person with one problem. That's how you cut through the noise.
Myth: You need a big budget to run successful ads. Truth: I've seen $50 campaigns outperform $5000 campaigns. It's about strategy, not spend. Focus on message-market fit first.
Myth: More traffic equals more sales. Truth: The right traffic equals more sales. A thousand unqualified visitors are worth less than ten qualified leads. Quality beats quantity every time.
